title: Finite Fields
description: Finite fields define the arithmetic space where Bitcoin elliptic-curve operations occur. Prime-field constraints make key operations deterministic and secure.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin: Keys and Addresses
resources.notes: Explains finite fields as the mathematical setting for secp256k1.

resources.title: secp256k1 README
resources.notes: Implementation-focused notes on finite-field arithmetic and optimization choices.

resources.title: BIP 340: Schnorr Signatures
resources.notes: Spec context for arithmetic over secp256k1 field elements.
